div.head: The Secretary of State to the United States Representative in Rumania (Berry)
div.p: 630. Please advise when Ethridge to return to Washington.Mr. Ethridge was due in Washington on December 4, according to telegram 937, December 3, from Bucharest (874.00/12–345). Dept would like to discuss with him suggestions contained Sofia’s tel 716 Nov 24 but if he does not anticipate returning in next few days will appreciate his comments by telegraph.For Mr. Ethridge’s letter of December 8 to the Secretary of State after returning to Washington, see vol. v, p. 638.

Meanwhile, Dept would also like Barnes’ views as to whether, if we leave next step to Bulgarians, as suggested his telegram, National Assembly meeting on Dec 15 will be likely to take action which will prejudice possibility our following course recommended Moscow’s 3859November 14, 7 p.m., p. 377. at later date.
Sent to Bucharest for Ethridge and to Sofia for Barnes.As No. 388.
